headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://unpkg.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; connect-src 'self';
